programs.title: Citizen
programs.desc: Antony assumes several identities and kidnaps three government officials in order to succeed in his secret mission. However, a CBI officer sets out to find the real identity of the kidnapper.

programs.title: Nayaki
programs.desc: Sanjay, a conniving youngster, takes his girlfriend to an old bungalow with the wrong intention. But a vengeful spirit who cannot tolerate immoral men wants to kill him.

programs.title: GANESH
programs.desc: In order to help a friend, Ganesh pretends to love a girl. She hates him when she finds out the truth. Eventually, he truly falls in love with her and must convince her of his true feelings.
